subject: New Assignment: Backend Developer – .NET – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Backend Developer with strong experience in .NET. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • .NET
  • AWS
  • Kubernetes
  • Redis
  • Kafka

Details:
Client: NordHealth
Start: 2021-05-22
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (on-site)
Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Marcus Holm
IT Recruitment Specialist
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 70 234 56 78
